channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Items fly tipped, 9th April
item.description:
Sofa and mattress ben fly tipped n the corner of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shinglewell Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins overflowing, 9th April
item.description:
All of the bins in the area including by the five arches bridge are full please send someone to empty them asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leafield Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked with window open for last month,, 9th April
item.description:
Black VAUXHALL ASTRA GS TURBO AUTO with window open for last month, no TAX, good nick but left unlocked, insurance papers inside glove box with named owners address (Peckham)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bike obstructing the pavement, 9th April
item.description:
Potential hazard to partially-sighted, blind, disabled and vulnerable pedestrians or mobility scooter users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 231, Gray's Inn Road, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By victoria mews bins, 9th April
item.description:
Fly tipping by victoria mews communal bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Car outside 51 gordon road, 9th April
item.description:
Car has been parked illegally for 4 days and has not moved Assume it is abandoned and is blocking the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gordon Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There's a big pothole on the main exits of the mini roundabout on Crossway after Pointer Close towards Nickleby Close and, 9th April
item.description:
It's been there for more than three months and it's causing a big problem for cars that are turning left on the mini roundabout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pointer Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping - Plumbing Pipe, 9th April
item.description:
This item (5 foot of copper pipe) has been on the pavement outside 72 Shortlands Road for over a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 victoria mews, 9th April
item.description:
Fly tipping in front of 1 victoria mews

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Flytip East Dulwich Grove nr 1 Velde Way, 9th April
item.description:
Growing flytip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Nimegen Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding required Deventer Crescent SE22 8TJ, 9th April
item.description:
Pavements in a bad state

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Deventer Crescent, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 9th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunholme Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 9th April
item.description:
Car has been left in the street since Christmas December 2025 with no road tax Rear window window smashed with plastic sheet over and mould growing inside

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harper Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 9th April
item.description:
Flytipping mattresses pallets rubble the lot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 9th April
item.description:
Dead fox needs clearing away. Starting to smell. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Bromley Common, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 rat holes, 9th April
item.description:
Within 3 weeks of the holes being filled which took 8 months (when they were big enough to break your leg in) they are back. The problem is permanent. Twice it was painted marked for attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole - over 1m diameter, 9th April
item.description:
There is a large pothole at the very top of Buckingham Avenue just as you turn off the High Road A1000. The pothole is approximately 1m diameter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckingham Avenue, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste has been dumped on my parking lot, 9th April
item.description:
Some building waste has been left in my parking lot restricting me from parking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finland Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 91E Salusbury (next door to 99 Hartland road), 9th April
item.description:
Assorted junk left by the residents of 91E Salusbury. Please let them know not to dispose of their unwanted items on the pavement for everyone else to deal with for them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Bucket of builder's rubbish left on pavement, 9th April
item.description:
A large plastic bucket of builder's rubbish including paint tins etc has been left on the pavement near the corner of Cross Road and Bowes Road. It is by some sort of black box.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cross Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet
